series_metadata.series_description: These files contain records related to administrative reviews/ hearings and represent the information and documentation considered for Final Determinations.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Retention period is 100 days at Tax Appeals Division. assessments that remain unpaid, retention paid, assessments that are paid ; Paper: Retention period is 100 days at Tax Appeals Division. assessments that remain unpaid, retention paid, assessments that are paid
